revision.comment: Template with ww2 alias is used in several dozens of articles, don't mess all that stuff.
Kyojitsuki is a warship and a flag of the armed forces.

[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 126101232 by [[Special:Contributions/Saburny|Saburny]] ([[User talk:Saburny|talk]]) Template with ww2 alias is used in several dozens of articles, don't mess all that stuff.
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 126536742 by [[Special:Contributions/Saburny|Saburny]] ([[User talk:Saburny|talk]]) As earlier, template with ww2 name is used in dozens of articles.
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Saburny|Saburny]] ([[User talk:Saburny|talk]]) to last version by Eleassar
use mediawiki border option for main flag too
default size to 20px to accommodate border
use MediaWiki border syntax in parent flag templates instead of alternate SVG images using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
transition complete - sport parameter no longer used using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
add alias for naval ensign -- a duplicate to the 'ww2' alias ATM; will migrate articles to the new alias and discontinue the old; see talk page
"ww2" alias no longer used on this project
test new documentation method - still in sandbox, but testing almost complete
